query:
INSERT INTO core.runs (
                manifest_id,
                service_name,
                instance_id,
                host,
                started_at,
                status,
                last_heartbeat_at
            )
            SELECT
                m.id,
                m.name,
                'manifest:' || m.version,
                $3,
                NOW(),
                $4,
                CASE WHEN $5 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END
            FROM core.manifests m
            WHERE m.name = $1 AND m.version = $2
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM core.runs r WHERE r.manifest_id = m.id
              )
